name: PlayStation — DualShock (analog)
desc: Enables the DualShock so the analog sticks work in games that support them.

name: Nintendo face-button layout
desc: Swaps A/B and X/Y to match Nintendo's physical button positions on Xbox-style pads.

name: Sega Genesis — 6-button pad
desc: Switches to the 6-button controller so X/Y/Z/Mode work (Genesis Plus GX).

name: Sega Saturn — 3D Control Pad
desc: Starting point: enables the analog 3D Control Pad (Beetle Saturn). Verify per game; remove if a game expects the digital pad.

name: Nintendo 64 — C-buttons on face buttons
desc: Starting point: routes the four C-buttons to the right-hand face buttons (Mupen64Plus-Next). Adjust in Remap in RetroArch to taste.

name: Arcade / Neo Geo — 6-button fight layout
desc: Starting point: Street-Fighter-style 6-button arrangement (LP MP HP / LK MK HK) for FBNeo / MAME / Neo Geo.
